title: Just Sit!
description: You can sit anywhere where you want.
body:
With this mod you can sit anywhere you want.

Just use the V key by default (can be changed in the key bind settings)

and sit down.

To stand up you just have to crouch, jump, move or simply press the V key again.

Works in multiplayer. (Server needs the mod too!)

You can change the rotation value of the model parts in the config file.

(But this is not synched to avoid cheating or bugs)

Mod Currently Supports:

**Forge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric: 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge: 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.1**

 

SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
